title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 66.120 - Change of venue — disqualification of judge — procedure
text:
66.120.  Change of venue — disqualification of judge — procedure. — A change of venue and disqualification of judge shall be allowed for the same reasons and proceeded upon in the same manner as in other misdemeanor cases.
(L. 1951 p. 397 § 11, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Effective 1-02-79
